methods.description: Process of acquiring and subsampling mastodon specimens from various institutions for DNA analysis.

steps.description: Mastodons were subsampled at each of the institutions that contributed specimens to this study.
Subsamples were then sent to the McMaster University Ancient DNA Centre, with all further processing conducted in dedicated ancient DNA clean rooms.
steps.searchable_summary: send subsamples to DNA center for processing

methods.description: Methodologies used to extract and process DNA from mastodon specimens to maximize successful DNA recovery.

steps.description: Specimens were processed using a variety of wet-lab methodologies to maximise the probability of successful DNA extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: apply wet-lab methodologies for DNA extraction

steps.description: Material was demineralised and digested in successive rounds with 0.5 M EDTA or a Proteinase K digestion buffer.
steps.searchable_summary: demineralize and digest material with EDTA or Proteinase K

steps.description: Supernatants were pooled and extracted using either organic or two different guanidinium-silica based extraction methods.
steps.searchable_summary: extract supernatants using organic or guanidinium-silica methods

steps.description: UDG-treated and non-UDG-treated libraries were prepared using double-stranded or single-stranded methodologies.
All libraries underwent 1-2 rounds of in-solution enrichment with a comprehensive proboscidean bait set.
steps.searchable_summary: enrich libraries with proboscidean bait set

methods.description: Process of mapping and curating DNA sequences to ensure quality and accuracy.

steps.description: Demultiplexed reads were trimmed and merged with leeHom using the ancient DNA flag.
steps.searchable_summary: trim and merge reads with leeHom

steps.description: Reads were mapped against the M. americanum mitochondrial reference genome using BWA with common ancient DNA settings.
steps.searchable_summary: map reads to mitochondrial reference genome with BWA

steps.description: Mapped reads that were either merged or properly paired were extracted using the retrieveMapped_single_and_ProperlyPair programme.
steps.searchable_summary: extract merged or properly paired mapped reads

steps.description: Replication duplicates were removed based on unique 5′ and 3′ positions.
Alignments were imported into Geneious and manually curated to remove any sequencing artefacts.
steps.searchable_summary: import alignments into Geneious and curate

steps.description: Regions below 3× minimum depth coverage were masked with Ns.
steps.searchable_summary: mask low coverage regions with Ns

steps.description: Final consensus sequences were obtained using the majority base call at each position.

methods.description: Aligning new mitochondrial genomes with previously published genomes for phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: The 33 new mitochondrial genomes were aligned with the only two mastodon mitochondrial genomes previously published using MUSCLE.
